channel.title: Shell on Lamine Abdellaoui
channel.description: Recent content in Shell on Lamine Abdellaoui

item.title: Save time with these Linux Shell commands
item.description: Here I put the list of Linux shell commands I use frequently and I find efficient and good to know sudo !! (or sudo bang bang): A lot of the time, when I copy a command, paste in shell and quickly press Enter, I realize I forgot to write sudo first. No worries, sudo !! rerun the last command with sudo prepended to it. Cut a word at a time backwards: Sometimes you want to remove a word backwrods in your command.
